name: Sheep Dog
short_description: As a sheepdog, collect as many sheep as you can in your hutches within a minute and compete for scores with sheepdogs from around the world!
detailed_description:
This is a casual action game in which you control a sheepdog and guide sheep to the shed while running around the farm!

The key to the game is understanding the characteristics of sheep and efficiently gathering sheep. You can enjoy a free style of play, such as moving the flock together by barking, or guiding the sheep one by one with good timing. The game can be played in a short amount of time and at a good tempo, and can be replayed easily!

In addition, use the online ranking feature to compete with players around the world for scores and prove your shepherding skills!
